verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lead me Lord, lead me by the hand And make me face the rising sun Comfort me through all the pain That life may bring There's no other hope That I can lean upon Lead me Lord Lead me all my life

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Walk by me, walk by me across The lonely road of everyday Take my arms and let your hand Show me the way Show the way to live inside your heart All my days, all my life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are my Light You're the Lamp upon my feet All the time my Lord I need You there You are my Light, I cannot live alone Let me stay by Your guiding love All through my life, lead me Lord (All through my life, all through my days Lead me, Oh Lord. Lead me Lord)

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lead me Lord, even though at times I'd rather go alone my way Help me take the right direction Take Your road Lead me Lord and never leave my side All my days, all my life
